_comment: Copy this file to board.config.json and edit vaultPath for THIS machine. If the vault folder isn't present, vault-linked documents just won't open — everything else on the board (all project cards, previews, notes, graph) still works with zero setup. Optional: set "password" to enable HTTP Basic Auth (username: arkatype) — REQUIRED before exposing the board through a tunnel (start-board-remote.bat).
